analysis.summary: The remote support session connected, but the screen remained black throughout the entire 2-minute recording. The technician's mouse cursor intermittently appeared and disappeared on the black screen, indicating an active connection but no visible desktop, preventing any work from being performed.
issues_observed: The remote screen displayed only a black image for the entire duration of the session, preventing technician interaction.
notable_events: The remote desktop failed to load, presenting only a black screen for the entire 2-minute session, rendering any support work impossible.
